raw_consumer_statement:
I am filing this complaint because I am appalled with Citi 's decision that there is insufficient information to support my claim for a partial refund of {$810.00}, which XXXX promised multiple times and ultimately refused to give me. 

On XX/XX/XXXX, I noticed a pricing discrepancy for XXXX XXXX XXXX XXXX on XXXX. Despite the listing showing {$130.00} per tire, the actual price increased to {$340.00} when I attempted to purchase. I contacted XXXX customer service, and after a detailed discussion, they instructed me to purchase the tires at the higher price with a promise of a partial refund. They confirmed the refund of {$810.00} several times in communications, including with their managers, but never processed it despite repeated follow-ups. I provided extensive evidence, including screenshots and confirmation emails. See attached docx file for a detailed timeline and screenshots of emails and chat transcripts with XXXX. 

When XXXX ultimately refused the refund, I initiated a dispute with Citi, confident that the overwhelming documentation supported my claim. I am deeply disappointed that Citi sided with XXXX, claiming insufficient evidence, despite the extensive proof I submitted. I respectfully request that the CFPB review this case and help rectify this unfair situation. Citi case ID = XXXX
